since_last: 53% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.86%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +1.88% · Gold +0.20% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 53% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.86%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.86%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.76%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +5.38%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.38%, AMAT +2.47%, PLTR +2.24%, KLAC +2.15%, LRCX +2.01%. Laggards: BIDU -3.69%, APP -1.87%, BABA -1.67%, META -1.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.94% at $159.02
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.94% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
